free_text: Fast neutron spectrum of the thermal reactor
Gamma energy was measured at the angle 90 deg
relative to neutron beam, intensity was measured
Ref. J,YF,59,(10),1733,1996 was moved in REL-REF.
Ref. and REL-REF of Engl.translations were added.
Energies were measured at 90 deg. angle,
To define angular distributions - spectrum was measured
For normalization of gamma-intensities at different
angles the transition 1- -> 2+ of 1195.109 keV was used
which theoretical angular distribution has Legendre
LVL-INI-ER -  Error in initial level energy
